name: import_xise
short_description: Import XISE project file settings into the created project
full_help:
import_xise

Description: 
Import XISE project file settings into the created project

Syntax: 
import_xise  [-copy_sources] [-quiet] [-verbose] <file>

Returns: 
true

Usage: 
  Name             Description
  ----------------------------
  [-copy_sources]  Copy all ISE sources into the created project
  [-quiet]         Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]       Suspend message limits during command execution
  <file>           Name of the XISE project file to be imported

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Copy all ISE sources into the created project
Suspend message limits during command execution
